one_time_description: Transfer of cash held in lawyer trusts ($35,908,818) and investments from Tyee Building Supplies LP and Gitxaala Horizon North Services LP into Gitxaala Enterprises LP; large new investment contribution of $48,863,216 to Gitxaala Enterprises LP
economic_notes: Gitxaala Enterprises LP formed with $48,863,216 contribution generating $5,102,522 income. Investments in North Coast Skeena CFE and North-Co-Corp Ferry Services Ltd. Guarantor on RBC loan for Tyee Building Supplies LP ($2,502,000) and Coast Industrial Construction Partnership ($13,500,000). LNG proponent revenue received.
notes: Cash held in lawyer trusts ($35,908,818 in 2021) was transferred to Gitxaala Enterprises LP during the year. Investments in Tyee Building Supplies LP and Gitxaala Horizon North Services LP were also transferred to Gitxaala Enterprises LP. Gitxaala Enterprises LP is a new entity with opening balance of nil and closing balance of $53,965,738. Total investments split between financial assets ($34,764,015) and non-financial assets ($20,973,080). Deferred revenue of $3,999,152 relates to CMHC Rapid Housing. Operating surplus by segment disclosed in Note 10. Segment disclosure referenced but full table not visible in provided pages.
